message:
feat(obligation): add MayHoldAmbiguous state for leak detection

Enhance the leak checker to handle control flow paths with different
obligation kinds more precisely.

Changes to VarState:
- Add MayHoldAmbiguous variant for paths where obligation kinds differ
- Refactor join() to properly handle all state combinations:
  - Same kinds merge to Held/MayHold as before
  - Different kinds merge to MayHoldAmbiguous
  - Ambiguous propagates through all further joins
- is_leak() now correctly identifies MayHoldAmbiguous as potential leak

New test:
- repro_leak_check_commutativity.rs: Verifies join() is commutative
  and handles ambiguous cases correctly

This fixes false negatives where different obligation kinds on
different paths were incorrectly merged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
